working_on.task: Implementation of Python Library Update Notification

pending_tasks.task: 🟢 LOW: Fix final flaky assertion in PythonUpdateCheckerTest (Singleton conflict)
🟢 LOW: Add Strict VideoID Regex validation before passing to backend

recent_changes.description: Implemented auto-check for youtube-transcript-api updates on PyPI with 24h cache and runtime version detection.
Fixed O(N2) string concatenation, added Python warmup, integrated AudioFocus ducking.

errors_encountered.solution: Added internal 'testVersion' to bypass JNI dependency during JVM tests.
Switched to MockWebServer for network isolation.

decisions_made.decision: Detect version at runtime via importlib.metadata
decisions_made.reason: Avoids hardcode sync issues with Chaquopy/pip.
Reduces network overhead and respects PyPI rate limits.
